# E-Commerce and Omni-Channel Fraud Following the Digital Acceleration

# E-Commerce and Omni-Channel Fraud Following the Digital Acceleration

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

The global pandemic fueled an unprecedented shift in how consumers shop. It also forced retailers to adapt quickly to new buying behaviors and, unfortunately, new fraud trends. Whether we like it or not, there are lasting impacts that merchants need to adjust to in order to survive.

In this guide, you’ll learn:

*   How to evaluate fraud prevention solutions with a unified commerce mindset
*   The trends that positively and negatively affected omni-channel retail
*   How to prepare for continued digital transaction growth
